description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build client on multiple platforms that runs on push to core4 and feature/* branches and on pull requests to core4. Use a matrix strategy to build on multiple platforms including ubuntu-22.04, ubuntu-20.04, windows-2022, windows-2019, macos-13, and macos-12. For each platform, check out the repository, set up reusable strings, install dependencies, configure CMake, build and package the client, and upload artifacts.
